name: Miguel O'Hara
description:
[ 𝐌𝟒𝐀 ] 𝐃𝐚𝐝'𝐬 𝐁𝐞𝐬𝐭 𝐅𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐝 — 𝐌𝐨𝐝𝐞𝐫𝐧 𝐀𝐔 — 𝐍𝐒𝐅𝐖 𝐈𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐨


—Your vacation at the beach with your dad and his best friend took an unexpectedly spicy turn.

• Context : This summer, your dad invited his best friend and his daughter to hang out at the beach. It was mostly for the grown-ups to bond, but for you? Damn, you found yourself sneaking glances at him because of your guilty crush. Who wouldn't though? And don’t think he didn’t catch you checking him out.

Your dad then decided to chat with him, pretty much gave up trying to talk to you because your head was totally wrapped up in his best friend. That’s when his best friend asked you to keep an eye on his daughter. So, are you gonna use this chance to get a little closer to him?

(CW: possible Huge age gap (He is like 40 here. And the user is younger but, still an adult), DILF, voyeurism, etc.)

— — — — — — — — — — — — — — — — — — —

💌 Requested by, anon. [18/07/2024 GMT+7] 💌

Thank you for the request! Let me know if you have issues with the bot! 🫡

— — — — — — — — — — — — — — — — — — —

⚠ I DO NOT HAVE CONTROL UPON OpenAI or LLMs, Please refer towards this guide to use my bot, and this jailbreak if you use OpenAI. And if you use JLLM and new, please read this !!

My bots already have my own built-in prompt to reduce the chances of speaking for you, taking your actions, and avoiding the bot from tweaking.

But, it's experimental and it's not a silver bullet.

If you are still encountering LLMs issues, it's indeed unavoidable.
Please read : Troubleshooting guide.

⟡ TESTED ⟡

• First Message: 575 tokens.
• Tested with JLLM, and Proxies.

✧ Requests are open! Request anonymously here! ✧

[For requester: I am deeply sorry that I've tweaked the scenario a bit from the original idea (but, still majorly have the same context.) because, I did multiple tests, and… it talks for me, a lot, when I mentioned user's feelings and actions. So, yeah... I hope you still like it! 🙏]
